title: galium corsicum var. soleirolii
intro: Galium corsicum var. soleirolii, also known as Corsican bedstraw, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Corsican bedstraw include relief from menstrual cramps, arthritis, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Corsican bedstraw can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
